title: Marketing Specialist (Bangkok Based, relocation provided)
required_skills: Bachelor's degree or higher from top university in a quantitative subject (computer science, mathematics, engineering, or science)
Ability to communicate fluently in English
0-2+ years experience in top-tier management consulting, investment banking, private equity, or strategy/business operations for fast-growing global tech company
bonus_skills: Experience in digital marketing (search/display/social campaigns: Google, Bing, Facebook, Instagram)
Exposure to data analysis packages or databases: SAS, R, SPSS, Python, VBA, SQL
matched_skills: Fluent English (C1) — satisfies English fluency requirement
Numerical reasoning: KPI dashboards, budget variance analysis, ROI reporting at HSBC and Intelligent Power — satisfies numerical reasoning requirement
Business operations and strategy experience: HSBC platform strategy PMO, ECE Group business development — partially satisfies strategy/business operations experience requirement
Intellectual curiosity: multi-sector career spanning shipping, FinTech, IoT, e-commerce — demonstrates breadth and curiosity
Digital marketing experience: campaign management and GTM execution at IPC (B2B GTM), Moli Media (live-stream events), GRG Banking (trade fairs) — satisfies digital marketing bonus requirement
KOL and social/digital marketing coordination at Moli Media — satisfies display/social campaign bonus
AI tools usage (ChatGPT, Claude) — demonstrates data tooling openness for SQL/Python bonus direction
missing_skills: Degree not from a quantitative field (management/PR/marketing rather than CS, maths, engineering) — JD specifies quantitative subject
No search engine marketing (SEM/PPC) hands-on experience with Google Ads, Bing, Baidu, Naver
No data analysis coding skills: Python, R, SQL, SAS, VBA — explicitly listed as bonus but relevant for modelling component
No investment banking or private equity experience
Relocation to Bangkok required — candidate is based in Germany (personal consideration, not a skills gap)
core_responsibilities: Search: Experiment with text ads, bidding, and campaign structures on Google, Bing, Baidu, Naver; adapt to new product features and roll out changes from successful tests
Display: Test, analyse, and optimise campaigns on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram
Modelling: Analyse data generated by experiments; develop optimisation models; build dashboards for account managers
recommended_emphasis: Highlight the marketing execution experience at Moli Media (large-scale live-stream events, 4,000+ attendees, KOL management) and IPC (B2B GTM, 4 product launches, campaign ROI analysis) as direct evidence of digital marketing operations
Frame the HSBC and ECE Group work as strategy/business operations experience within global organisations
Quantify the ROI and audience analytics work at Moli Media to demonstrate numerical reasoning
Note the Bangkok relocation requirement explicitly in the application — the relocation package is provided, so this is a practical rather than disqualifying factor
The quantitative degree gap is a genuine weakness; compensate by leading with analytical results and Excel/BI tool proficiency
summary: Moderate match at 52.5%. The candidate's digital marketing experience (GTM campaigns, KOL management, event operations, ROI analytics) aligns with the display/search marketing responsibilities, and the business operations experience at HSBC and ECE Group partially satisfies the strategy/operations pathway. The main gaps are the quantitative degree requirement and absence of search engine marketing (SEM/PPC) or coding skills (Python, SQL). The Bangkok relocation is a significant personal decision factor. Worth applying given the marketing background, but the quantitative degree gap and SEM inexperience should be addressed in the cover letter.
